items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Introducing B2B Signals".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=How frontier enterprises are building an AI advantage published=Wed, 06 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/introducing-b2b-signals description=OpenAI’s B2B Signals research shows how frontier enterprises deepen AI adoption, scale Codex-powered agentic workflows, and build durable competitive advantage. title=Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection) published=Tue, 05 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/mrc-supercomputer-networking description=OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.

title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
-title=Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
-description=OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
title=New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
-description=Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.
